comments.author: @elynborjasen1835
comments.text:
The Philippines sucks!  Unfortunately, the Philippines is a fool's paradise for foreign men looking for a partner and love., friendly smiles, affordability, beaches, and pleasant weather.  
We harshly criticize the Philippines for the skin tax.  Charging foreigners different prices just because they are foreigners, especially for white skin.  That is brutally unjust when you see it at beaches, provincial markets, and in several services across the Philippines.  For example, a local pays 50 pesos, a foreigner pays 200 pesos for the same exact thing.  We understand the economic argument.  Foreigners earn more, so they can afford more, but that's not how you build trust.  That's how you create resentment.  When tourists and expats feel like they're being ripped off at every turn just for being foreign.  They tell everyone, it spreads, and your reputation suffers.  Thailand, Indonesia, and the Philippines engage in these same kinds of scams against foreigners.  It is an idiotic policy that earns you a few extra dollars per transaction while costing you immeasurably in goodwill.  Japan, South Korea, Europe, including Spain, Portugal, and other Western countries such as Canada and the USA, charge everyone the same.  That's how you build trust, respect, and sustainable tourism.
Another thing is the complete lack of consequences for scamming foreigners.  For example, a taxi driver who refuses to use the meter should lose the license.  A tour operator who takes deposits and disappears should be arrested.  Bars and hotels that add fake charges to pay your bill should be shut down.  The Philippines had one of the world's highest rates of dating app scammers, which should be banned.  Unfortunately, enforcement is practically non-existent.  So, scammers face no risk, and honest businesses suffer by association.  That is about the basic principles of the rule of law and consumer protection and for Foreigners is none existant. Other developing countries manage it better.  Not the Philippines.  The Philippines is notorious for corruption and bribery due to a lack of accountability and government mismanagement, with its ideological influence under the old Spanish colonialism culture.  Lies, scams, cheats, and con artists are prevalent in the Philippines.  That made foreigners resentful and averse toward the Philippines. 
Do not forget that the Philippines is the land of mass poverty, full of gold diggers and scammers.   The Philippines has one of the world's highest rates of single mothers as a result of promiscuity and prostitution.  The Catholic laws in the Philippines society prohibit birth control, abortion, and divorce.  The majority of Filipino women want to marry foreigners to escape poverty and exploit the foreign men for financial purposes.  Filipinos will chase your money, and they will drain your money until you are bankrupt.  They pretend to love you with their friendly and sweet smiles while exploiting you.  Filipino women use their tools to beautify themselves and be pleasant to attract foreigners, until they are hideously wicked and dupe gullible foreigners into a financial trap.  Their main hobby is to rip off foreign men for monetary gain.  Avoid relationships with single mothers because they want you to support their children and families, or you will suffer financial hardship.  
Can Filipino women write this?  No chance!  They are functionally illiterate due to a low level of higher education in the Philippines.  They only smell your ATM, and it is their GOAL to empty it and disappear. Married scammers husbands allow their wives to stay with their PRAY and have sex for as long as it takes for her to empty his ATM  then disappear.
